extraction_notes: Extracted from 163-page schematic PNGs. M2 Pro/Max variant. Uses Austringer (not Viper) and CLVR (not Monaco). Pro/Max BOM variants noted.
WARNING: A2779 uses AUSTRINGER VR (U9300) instead of A2442 Viper. CLVR instances (C0-C4) replace Monaco. Cobra replaces Madea for HDMI. Carlow B0 audio codec.

ics.description: Main SoC. Pro has 10/12-core CPU + 16/19-core GPU. Max has 12-core CPU + 30/38-core GPU. Same power domain topology as M1 Pro/Max but with M2-gen naming.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator (42A design)
ics.description: 42A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Higher current than A2442 (30A). 3 Iceman gate driver phases. Component range: R57xx, C57xx.

Slave PMU. Buck outputs: BUCK0 (SRAM_S1), BUCK1 (unused on C platforms), BUCK2 (ECPU_SRAM_AWAKESW), BUCK3 (1V8_S2), BUCK4 (VDDQ0H1_S2SW), BUCK5 (SOC_S1), BUCK6 (CIO_S2SW), BUCK7 (DISP2_AWAKESW/actually see aliases), BUCK8 (1V2_AWAKE), BUCK9 (DCS_S1), BUCK10 (ECPU_AWAKESW/see aliases), BUCK11 (VDDOO_S1), BUCK12 (PP1V2_S2). LDOs: LDO0-LDO6, SW0-SW2.

Master PMU. Buck outputs: BUCK0 (SRAM_S1), BUCK1 (GPU_BMPR_S1), BUCK2 (unused), BUCK3 (1V8_S2SW), BUCK4 (VDDQ0H1_S2SW), BUCK5 (ECPU_AWAKESW), BUCK6 (AMPH1_S2SW), BUCK7 (DCS_S1), BUCK8 (FIXED_S1_S2SW), BUCK9 (AMPH0_S2SW), BUCK10 (VDDOO_S1). LDOs: LDO0-LDO4, SW1.

ics.function: Austringer VR controller (replaces Viper on A2442)
ics.description: Multi-phase voltage regulator controller for high-current SoC domains. 5-phase design with Iceman gate driver support. Routes AUSTRINGER_BOOT_1 and AUSTRINGER_GWM1. Controls power stages on pages 49-51. Fed by PPVIN_PVRVD0N and PP5V_S2_MAIN.

ics.function: CLVR VR — PCPU power (replaces part of Monaco on A2442)
ics.description: CFG = D (12+2+12+2). 4 bucks: BUCK0/HP0 (PPVDD_PCPU0_AWAKESW), BUCK1/LP0 (PPVDD_PCPU0_SRAMB_AWAKESW), BUCK2/HP1 (PPVDD_PCPU1_AWAKESW), BUCK3/LP1 (PPVDD_PCPU1_SRAMB_AWAKESW). OTP = MP.
CFG = A (13+1+13+1). 4 bucks: BUCK0/HP0 (PPVDD_GPU0_AWAKESW), BUCK1/LP0 (PPVDD_GPU0_SRAM_AWAKESW), BUCK2/HP1 (PPVDD_GPU0_SRAMB_AWAKESW), BUCK3/LP1. OTP = AP.
CFG = A (13+1+13+1). Same buck layout as CLVR1 but for GPU1 cluster. Only populated on Max. OTP = AP.
CFG = E (4+0+24+0). Buck0/HP0 and Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_DPL0_AWAKESW, PPVDD_FABRIC_S1). Buck8/HP1 unused on C platforms. OTP = QP (C platforms) / RP (D platforms).
CFG = F_P (12+1+15+0). BUCK0/HP0 (PPVDD_ANE_AWAKESW), BUCK1/LP0 (PPVDD_ANE_SRAM_AWAKESW), BUCK2/HP1 (PPVDD_APR_CS_S1). OTP = UP.
Main charger IC. Multi-FET input stage. Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON. ARKANOID debug connector (J5150) on battery page.
Produces PP5V_S2 (VOUT=15V, f=1.25MHz). Different IC from A2442 TPS62130. Input from PPBUS_AON via XWC260. Start up time typ=6.0ms.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Left port 0. CD3217/ACE3 ORCT_TABLE IC with SPI ROM. Manages CC signaling and VBUS switching.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Left port 1. Same architecture as ATC0.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: Right port. Different designator prefix (UG vs UF) from left ports.
Handles HDMI output. OMIT_TABLE IC. HDMI connector JH500 (RCPT-HDMI-C-BLK-X1502). Different from A2442's Madea retimer.
Controls SD card slot. SDCARD POWER SUPPORT page shows TPS62130-style VR (Iout Max = 2.08A, f=1.25MHz) with LDO output.
Two instances: SSD0 Ocarina (page 107) and SSD1 Ocarina (page 112).
MagSafe connector. APN: MLB:516S00787, Flex:516S00788. Q5401 MOSFET pair. Configured as UPC5 (16 pin size).
Eos Secure Element IC. SN300V wired mode SE only. Replaces Ceres on A2442. DS303891/DS117A6.
Mini-LED backlight driver. Fed from PPBUS_AON. Output: PPVOUT_LUXE. OMIT_TABLE IC.

Carlow B0 silicon audio codec. I2C address: 0H TO UNO = 0x10, 1SNK TO UNO = 0x1A, 0SNK TO VDDGO = 0xBA10, 0H TO VDDGO = 0xBA08. Fed by PP3V8_CODEC_VP (VP supply), CODEC_DP_1V0_FILT, PP1V2_CODEC_VL_VD.
SLGAP5157V. Controls EDP_PANEL_3V0_EN and EDP_PANEL_DISCHARGE. Feeds UP730 (3V29 to backlight) and UP701 (3V8 to MDB). PP3V8_AON input.
Willamette WiFi 6E + BT module. OMIT_TABLE. 2GFEM_C0/C1, 5GFEM, 5GFEM_C0/C1 antenna front-end modules. Fed by PPVBAT_AON_WLBT and PP3V8_AON_WLBT.
